subtitle: Chief Information Officer -- Enterprise Technology Portfolio | Executive Partnership | Multi-Stakeholder Governance
summary_text: Senior technology executive with 14 years of full-function CTO/CIO leadership at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). Owned a $15M+ IT operating budget within $30-50M total IT spend; led 35+ direct and 75+ extended staff; governed technology investment across infrastructure, software development, data and analytics, security, and contact center operations. Built and ran the Enterprise PMO from scratch -- 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio. Sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance; delivered multiple zero-disruption go-lives on major platform transformations. Currently consulting independently on AI architecture, automation, and implementation while targeting the next executive technology leadership seat.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Appointed as the first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across IT operations, infrastructure, software engineering, data, security, and contact center operations; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years; team-of-teams structure including Head of Data, Head of Infrastructure, ePMO leader, and two software development leads.

Owned $15M+ IT operating budget within $30-50M total IT spend; led 4-5 board engagements per year; maintained year-over-year budget adherence and accurate financial forecasting through major pandemic disruption and recovery.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across $30-50M annual portfolio.

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Owned data function end-to-end -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.

Led full enterprise contact center / communications platform transformation with zero service disruption on day-one go-live; modernized SDLC through Agile transformation -- doubled development throughput; led digital transformation driving 200%+ growth in SEO and digital acquisition.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: CIO/CTO Full-Function, Board Engagement, Executive Stakeholder Alignment, Multi-Stakeholder Governance, Consensus / Earned-Veto Operating Model
$15M+ IT Operating Budget, $30-50M Total IT Spend, Financial Forecasting, Variance Analysis, Vendor Budget Governance
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Cloud Migration, Multi-Generation End-User Compute, Network/Endpoint Security, Identity
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Power BI, Tableau, Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation
Enterprise PMO Governance, Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, Multi-Factor Prioritization, Build-Buy-Partner
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
